decision_rules.expand_data: Use if top failures are mostly coverage_limited_sparse_failure and error remains correlated with 12D NN distance.
decision_rules.feature_or_model_change: Use if dense_model_feature_loss_failure dominates or specific A3/S3/B2 angle/amplitude failures persist at low NN distance.
decision_rules.measurement_geometry_change: Consider if dense failures cluster around physically ambiguous C1/A3/S3 couplings under the current two-defocus geometry.
